author: chandandakka@gmail.com
name: ai-interview-coach
description: An intelligent AI career coach designed to help technical candidates master interview narratives. It simulates professional responses that demonstrate deep technical expertise, real-world problem-solving, and architectural trade-off analysis. By providing concise, 30-second conversational scripts, it helps users articulate complex concepts, share impactful evidence from past experiences, and discuss alternative approaches with the confidence of a lead engineer.

environment_variables.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM calls
The specific LLM model ID (e.g., anthropic/claude-3-haiku)
Exa API key for real-world case study research
Mem0 API key for persistent cross-session user memory
